text: I lead my day, my impulses do not lead me.
My body is under construction and I show up for the build daily.
I move with calm confidence and clean posture.
I choose food that fuels power, focus, and recovery.
I keep promises to myself, especially the small ones.
My aura is built through disciplined reps, not random motivation.
I carry myself like the man I am becoming.
I speak clearly, move intentionally, and finish what I start.
I make strong decisions quickly and refine as I go.
Every day I stack evidence that I am trustworthy to myself.
My standards are high because my future is valuable.
As I think, so I become. (Bruce Lee)
Knowing is not enough, I apply. Willing is not enough, I do. (Bruce Lee)
I do not pray for an easy life, I pray for strength to endure a difficult one. (Bruce Lee)
I am not here to live up to other people's expectations. (Bruce Lee)
I stay adaptable and fluid, like water. (Bruce Lee)
